Login Try it free

Company

Dataland is a non-profit initiative building shared infrastructure for high-quality sustainability data. The platform provides structured, source-based ESG data to financial institutions across Europe.

Dataland is part of the Werte-Stiftung foundation, with strategic support from d-fine and PwC.

Leadership team

Moritz Kiese

Managing Director

Moritz leads Dataland with a focus on open-source sustainability infrastructure and European ESG data standards.

Andreas Höcherl

Product Owner

Andreas shapes the product vision, working closely with regulatory stakeholders and institutional members.

Soeren Vorsmann

Operations & Customer Relations

Soeren oversees platform operations, infrastructure, and member onboarding.
